✈️

CASTAWAY

3AW · Desert Island

Your Mission

You're castaways on a desert island for one whole year. With your camp, agree on what to take — and be ready to say why.
Choose 5 things to take
🎵A SONGone you'll never get tired of
🎬A FILMyou could watch again and again
📖A BOOKto keep you company
💎A SPECIAL THINGsomething from home
🛠️A SURVIVAL OBJECTto help you stay alive
Your three steps
1
DISCUSS
in your camp — agree on your 5 things
2
WRITE
in your exercise book, title Our Castaway Choices — your 5 items + the why
3
PRESENT
to the class, and explain your choices
